description: Claude Workflows lifecycle hooks — auto-check for active workflows on session start and remind about quality gates before git push.

hooks.prompt: Check if .workflows/current-state.md exists. If it does, read it and briefly tell the user there's an active workflow they can resume. Also check for .workflows/paused-*.md files. If nothing exists, say nothing. Be very brief — one line max.

Before creating this PR, verify the quality gate: Have you loaded and checked .claude/reviews/general-checklist.md and the language-specific checklist? If not, respond with 'BLOCK: Run quality gate first — load review checklists from .claude/reviews/ and self-check all High/Critical items.' If quality gate was already done, respond with an empty string.

Check if .workflows/current-state.md exists and has an active workflow. If it does, verify that the current phase output has been written and the state file has been updated. If the state is stale (phase output missing), respond with 'BLOCK: Write phase output and update state before pushing.' Otherwise respond with an empty string.
